backend/main.mo: Main actor implementing user profile management and contact inquiry system with role-based access control (admin/user permissions) using Internet Identity authentication.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module defining data structures (UserProfile, ContactInquiry) and a pass-through migration function to preserve state across canister upgrades.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting completion of Escoffiers Global Solutions branding restoration and content maintenance across frontend pages.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including pages, components, hooks, and configuration with focus on Escoffiers branding, routing, authentication, and styling.
frontend/DOMAIN_SETUP.md: Documentation guide for connecting the escoffiers.com custom domain to Internet Computer frontend canister via DNS configuration without third-party hosting.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles defining OKLCH color palette with nature-inspired tones (sage/mint/forest green) for both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with Escoffiers branding metadata, SEO tags, Open Graph/Twitter cards, favicon links, Google Fonts, and cache control headers.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with all routes (home, about, services, recruitment, gallery, team, contact, admin) and shared layout with header/footer.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminNavLi: Conditional navigation link to admin dashboard that only renders when user is authenticated via Internet Identity.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Authentication button component handling Internet Identity login/logout with loading states and query cache clearing on sign-out.
frontend/src/components/auth/RequireAuth: Route guard component that displays sign-in prompt for unauthenticated users and renders protected content only when authenticated.
frontend/src/components/contact/ContactD: Displays contact information cards with location (India), email (info@escoffiers.com), business hours (Mon-Sat 9AM-6PM IST), and a note about 24-48 hour response time.
frontend/src/components/contact/ContactF: Contact form component with fields for name, email, phone, company, and message that submits inquiries using the useSubmitInquiry hook and shows success/error states.
frontend/src/components/site/BrandLogo.t: Reusable brand logo component supporting three variants (logo-only, logo-with-text, wordmark) with configurable sizes and optional link wrapping.
frontend/src/components/site/Container.t: Simple container wrapper component that applies responsive padding and max-width constraints for consistent page layout.
frontend/src/components/site/Footer.tsx: Site footer with three columns containing brand logo, quick navigation links, contact info, and a copyright notice with caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/site/Header.tsx: Sticky header with brand logo, desktop navigation menu, mobile sheet menu, admin link, and login button with active route highlighting.
frontend/src/components/site/Section.tsx: Simple section wrapper component that applies consistent vertical padding (py-16 md:py-24) for page sections.
frontend/src/config/branding.ts: Centralized branding configuration exporting paths to logo, wordmark, favicon, OG image assets and company name constants.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with authentication, automatically invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInquiries.ts: React Query hooks for fetching all contact inquiries or a single inquiry by ID from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/usePageMeta.ts: React hook that dynamically updates document title and meta tags (description, OG, Twitter) for SEO and social sharing.
frontend/src/hooks/useSubmitInquiry.ts: React Query mutation hook for submitting contact inquiries via the actor, with success/error toast notifications and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom eco-friendly color palette (sage/forest green theme) for light and dark modes using CSS custom properties.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: About page describing Escoffiers Global Solutions' history, services (restaurant consulting, hospitality, recruitment), mission, and vision since 2013.
frontend/src/pages/admin/Inquiries.tsx: Admin dashboard page for viewing and managing contact inquiries with a table listing all submissions and a dialog for viewing full inquiry details.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Contact page with form submission, success state display, and contact details section for customer inquiries.
frontend/src/pages/Gallery.tsx: Gallery page showcasing project categories (kitchen design, restaurant concepts, cloud kitchens) with statistics and success stories.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Homepage with hero section, company introduction, and key features highlighting Escoffiers' restaurant consulting and hospitality services.
frontend/src/pages/Recruitment.tsx: Recruitment services page showcasing domestic and international hiring for hospitality industry, including blue-collar and white-collar roles with documentation support and compliance assistance.
frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx: Services overview page listing seven core consulting offerings: restaurant concept development, kitchen design, menu engineering, operational audits, staff training, franchise development, and turnaround consulting.
frontend/src/pages/Team.tsx: Team page highlighting the company's experienced hospitality professionals and their collaborative, results-driven approach with industry expertise.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters and sessionStorage values, supporting both standard and hash-based routing.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system, custom fonts (Inter and Playfair Display), container settings, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state file for Escoffiers Global Solutions website tracking deployment issues, feature requests for backend actor initialization with user profiles and contact inquiry system, and verification of existing multi-page navigation and employer login functionality.
